title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.13.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/selinux](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux) | `v1.13.0` -> `v1.13.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.13.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.13.0/v1.13.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/selinux (github.com/opencontainers/selinux)</summary>

### [`v1.13.1`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.13.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.13.0...v1.13.1)

This release includes a minor update to reduce the minimum version
requirement of the `github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin` package from
v0.6.0 to v0.5.1. We did not use any of the newer features, so
downgrading is a no-op but will help with downstreams that need to
backport `github.com/opencontainers/selinux` updates.

##### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 8 to 9 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​240](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/240)
- downgrade github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.5.1 by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [#​242](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/242)

##### New Contributors

- [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) made their first contribution in [#​242](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/242)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.13.0...v1.13.1>

</details>
